description: Style NoteThis ethnic wear kurta by aurelia succeeds in combining traditional floral motifs with the design sensibilities of young, modern indian women. Pair it with  stilettoes to look bold, beautiful and stylish.Product DetailsCream kurta with all over print, round neck with split, embroidered piping in red at neck, patch with unusual weave at sleeve and bottom hem, three quarter sleeve, vented hem Material and Care100% cottonMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shade inside outHot iron Size and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5’8”, chest 33” and waist 28”) is wearing a size M
